r 11 2016 CONTENTS lp_solve Documentation lp_solve -------- lp_solve (http://lpsolve.sourceforge.net/5.5/) is a Mixed Integer Linear Programming (MILP) solver, originally from the Eindhoven University of Technology. The command li

University of Technology. The command line program (accepts input files) is installed for CS170 on the Instructional UNIX (Linux) computers. For names and locations of the computers, please see http://inst.eecs.berkeley.edu/connectin

please see http://inst.eecs.berkeley.edu/connecting.html#labs The command line program can be run as /share/b/bin/lp_solve. For example: /share/b/bin/lp_solve -S3 ~cs170/lp_solve/test.inp /share/b/bin/lp_solve -help To display grap

/share/b/bin/lp_solve -help To display graphical output, your desktop computer must be running an XWindows manager. For help, please see http://inst.eecs.berkeley.edu/connecting.html#xwindows Documentation ------------- Documentatio
